		fix_variable_error = { ERROR = global_red_tint_activated }
		fix_variable_error = { ERROR = local_red_tint_activated }
		fix_variable_error = { ERROR = global_green_tint_activated }
		fix_variable_error = { ERROR = local_green_tint_activated }
	}
}
